landing.title: It's okay. You can talk here.
landing.subtitle: Free. Anonymous. Nothing you say is stored.
landing.reassurance: No name. No account. No sign-up. When you leave, everything is gone.
landing.pillar1Text: Voice or text, in your language. Warm, patient, there at 2 AM.
landing.pillar2Text: Free helplines and volunteer listeners — call, WhatsApp or chat, even without a SIM.
landing.pillar3Text: No account, no number, no trace. Everything disappears minutes after you leave.

chat.endedNote: This conversation is gone now. Nothing was kept. Come back anytime.
chat.offline: We can't reach Zenith right now — but you don't have to wait. These real people can help immediately:
chat.voiceUnsupported: Voice input works in Chrome and Edge — typing works everywhere.

support.panelTitle: Real people you can reach right now
support.panelNote: All of these are free. None of them will know who you are unless you tell them.
support.vandrevalaWhatsapp: Vandrevala on WhatsApp — chat, no SIM needed
support.icallChat: iCall online — chat and email support
support.sevencups: 7 Cups — chat with a listener online
